name: Indian Potato Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. To make onion relish, in a bowl combine onions, spices, seasonings, and lemon juice. Mix well with your fingers.
2. Let the mixture sit for an hour.
3. Just before serving, stir in chopped coriander.
4. Boil the potatoes until tender in lightly salted water, then cool and cut them in half.
5. Slice zucchini on the bias into 5mm thick slices.
6. Heat ghee in a heavy-bottomed saucepan and sauté onion, ginger, garlic, and chillies until soft.
7. Add spices and fry for 30 seconds.
8. Add all vegetables and toss well.
9. Gradually add coconut cream while cooking.
10. To make raita, strain yoghurt through a fine sieve for 15 minutes.
11. Grate the cucumber with skin on.
12. Chop mint leaves.
13. Peel, seed, and dice tomatoes.
14. Combine vegetables with yoghurt and seasonings; chill.
15. Add chopped coriander and lemon juice to taste when the vegetables are cooked and a thick sauce has formed.
